description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named TestNetwork that runs on push events, excluding tags matching *DB*. The workflow consists of four jobs: osx_job on macOS-latest, linux_job and linux_docker_job on ubuntu-18.04, and windows_job on windows-latest. Each job checks out the repository, sets up the AWS CLI, tags the commit, initializes submodules, installs dependencies, and then builds and deploys an artifact to AWS, with some jobs using Docker and others using specific build scripts.
